mutation_endpoint.description: tRPC mutation that initiates chat. Returns application/json. No SSE streaming on this endpoint.

streaming_endpoint.description: Actual streaming endpoint. Content-Type: text/event-stream. Uses tRPC httpBatchStreamLink indexed format.

index_meanings.15: message subscription - streaming text content via JSON patches

critical_findings.apf_was_targeting_wrong_endpoint: APF blocks /api/trpc/message.newChat?batch=1 and returns fake response there. But the ACTUAL streaming happens on /api/chat which is a SEPARATE endpoint.
critical_findings.correct_format_for_apf: If APF intercepts /api/chat, the response must use tRPC httpBatchStreamLink format: each line as '{index}:{json}\n' where index is a number (like 15 for message data)
critical_findings.two_endpoint_architecture: message.newChat creates the chat (returns JSON), then /api/chat streams the content (returns text/event-stream with indexed format)

recommendation.option_2: Block at message.newChat level with proper tRPC batch response format (JSON array, not SSE)
recommendation.note: Option 1 matches the real streaming architecture and is more likely to display correctly in the chat UI
